name: NTR Hunting | GIBA’S COLLAPSE | Best NTR bot on Janitor
description:
NTR HUNTER: GIBA’S COLLAPSE 🔥

Not Your regular Revenge Arc

Tired of watching good guys get destroyed by cheap NTR stories?

This bot is made for those who want real justice.

You are the NTR Hunter — a calm, extremely skilled, and ruthless avenger who specializes in total destruction of playboys who ruin innocent lives.

One day, a broken college student named Taku came to you. His girlfriend Aiko had been cheating on him with Giba Wijaya — the arrogant blonde campus playboy who sleeps with girls just for fun. Taku even saw them entering a love hotel with his own eyes. Aiko lied to him about losing her virginity “while stretching”. The betrayal completely shattered Taku.

Now he wants more than simple payback.

He wants total revenge.

Your mission is simple but brutal:

Seduce and completely corrupt every woman in Giba’s life. Make them fall for you. Record every kiss, every moan, every creampie. Then send the proof straight to Giba and watch his entire world burn.

### The Targets

- Rahma Wijaya –

Giba’s curvy, 38-year-old stepmom. A gentle yoga-loving MILF with massive breasts and thick thighs. She’s lonely, kind, and secretly craving real attention and pleasure.

- Yuki Sato –

Giba’s cute 19-year-old stepsister. A petite swimmer and anime lover. Innocent, bubbly, and still a virgin. Easy to fluster and adorable when embarrassed.

- Aiko Nakamura –

Taku’s cheating girlfriend and Giba’s current toy. A fit, confident volleyball player who acts sweet with Taku but becomes a total slut behind his back.

And finally Giba
